canteen_dish_votes_identity_chk.name: canteen_dish_votes_identity_chk
canteen_dish_votes_identity_chk.value:
(
        ("canteen_dish_votes"."user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "canteen_dish_votes"."anonymous_session_id" IS NULL) OR
        ("canteen_dish_votes"."user_id" IS NULL AND "canteen_dish_votes"."anonymous_session_id" IS NOT NULL)
      )

canteen_menu_items_external_identity_uid.name: canteen_menu_items_external_identity_uidx
canteen_menu_items_external_identity_uid.where: "canteen_menu_items"."external_source" is not null and "canteen_menu_items"."external_key" is not null
